sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Universal Technical Institute EVP, Chief Legal Officer Sold Shares Worth Over $888K
feed.summary: Kevane Christopher E., the EVP and Chief Legal Officer of Universal Technical Institute (UTI), reported selling 23,654 shares of common stock for a total of $888,115. The shares were sold at a weighted average price of $37.5461, with individual transaction prices ranging from $37.16 to $37.79. Following this transaction, Mr. Kevane directly owns 83,521 shares of UTI common stock.

feed.title: Space-Themed Doughnut Collaborations
feed.summary: Krispy Kreme has launched a limited-edition "Artemis II Doughnut" to celebrate NASA's upcoming Artemis II mission, featuring blue icing, cookie crumble, and cream. This collaboration highlights how brands connect with cultural moments through themed products to boost engagement. The article explores the implications of such limited-edition cultural tie-ins, experience-driven food design, and brand-space collaborations for various industries.

feed.title: Vertiv, Comfort Systems USA lead S&P 500 industrials movers in Q1 (NYSEARCA:XLI)
feed.summary: The State Street Industrial Select Sector SPDR ETF (XLI) saw a significant increase of 4.3% in the first quarter of 2026, outperforming the broader S&P 500 Index which declined by 4.6% during the same period. The best performers within the S&P 500 industrials for Q1 included companies like Vertiv and Comfort Systems USA. This surge indicates strong performance within the industrials sector, specifically highlighting key movers like Vertiv and Comfort Systems USA.

feed.title: MTLS Technical Analysis & Stock Price Forecast
feed.summary: The article provides a technical analysis and stock price forecast for Materialise NV (MTLS). It indicates a 'Neutral' technical sentiment for MTLS based on an aggregation of 13 technical signals, with 6 buy indicators and 7 sell indicators. Key metrics like RSI, MACD, and moving averages are detailed, along with support and resistance levels.

feed.title: Universal Insurance (NYSE: UVE) exec sells 946 shares after RSU vesting
feed.summary: Universal Insurance Holdings CIO & CAO, Kimberly D. Campos, sold 946 shares of company stock for approximately $32,278 after RSU vesting. Following the transactions, which included 1,251 RSUs converting to common shares and 305 shares withheld for taxes, Campos now directly holds 7,422 common shares. The sale occurred on March 31, 2026, following RSU vesting on March 27, 2026.

feed.title: D-Wave Quantum Shares Rebound Amidst Sector Volatility
feed.summary: D-Wave Quantum (QBTS) shares experienced significant volatility this week, initially plunging after Alphabet unveiled its "TurboQuant" algorithm, then rebounding strongly. Despite a year-to-date loss exceeding 50%, analysts remain bullish with a consensus price target of $36.50, suggesting a potential 153% upside. The market is now watching how further developments in software-based quantum efficiency will affect demand for specialized quantum hardware.

feed.title: Enterprise Products Partners (EPD) Price Target Bumped to $42 at RBC Capital
feed.summary: RBC Capital has increased its price target for Enterprise Products Partners L.P. (EPD) to $42 from $40, maintaining an 'Outperform' rating. This adjustment reflects slightly higher estimates and valuation multiples due to potential for sustained high commodity prices. EPD's stock has already risen over 21% since the start of 2026, and the company posted record EBITDA in Q4 2025, with projections for significant adjusted EBITDA and cash flow growth in 2027.

feed.title: Senti Biosciences (SNTI) holder NEA discloses 3.78M-share, 12.1% stake
feed.summary: New Enterprise Associates 15, L.P. (NEA) has filed an amended Schedule 13D/A, disclosing a 12.1% stake in Senti Biosciences (SNTI), equating to 3,775,615 shares. The decrease in their percentage ownership (by more than 1%) is due to an increase in Senti's outstanding shares, not a result of NEA buying or selling shares. NEA holds these shares for investment purposes and currently has no specific plans for corporate actions.

feed.title: IShares MSCI Brazil ETF Options Spot-On: On March 31st, 381.29K Contracts Were Traded, With 4.54 Million Open Interest
feed.summary: On March 31st, the iShares MSCI Brazil ETF (EWZ.US) saw significant options activity, with a total trading volume of 381.29K contracts. Call options dominated, accounting for 92.21% of transactions. The ETF also had an open interest of approximately 4.54 million contracts, representing 86.58% of the average over the past 30 trading days.

feed.title: Cloverdale: Lands’ Vote on Republic Services Raises Legal Red Flags
feed.summary: The article highlights a significant conflict of interest involving Cloverdale Mayor Todd Lands. It alleges that Mayor Lands voted on critical waste management contracts directly impacting Republic Services, a company that was a source of over $10,000 in income for his construction business, in violation of California's Political Reform Act. The author argues that this constitutes a mandatory disqualifying conflict, as Lands failed to disclose the conflict, recuse himself, or leave the room during deliberation and voting, potentially rendering the vote legally voidable.

feed.title: Mudrick group keeps 58.4% stake in Vertical Aerospace (EVTL) after $50M raise
feed.summary: Mudrick Capital and its affiliated funds maintain a substantial 58.4% stake in Vertical Aerospace Ltd. (EVTL) following the company's recent $50 million at-the-market share issuance. This stake, comprising ordinary shares, convertible senior secured notes, and warrants, was slightly diluted by the capital raise but still represents a controlling interest. Concurrently, Mudrick Capital Management agreed in principle to extend the maturity of existing convertible notes and committed to providing a facility for up to an additional $50 million in new convertible secured notes for Vertical Aerospace.

feed.title: FCPT announces acquisition of a Chili's property for $2.3 million
feed.summary: Four Corners Property Trust (FCPT) has announced the acquisition of a Chili's property for $2.3 million. This acquisition is part of FCPT's strategy to primarily acquire and lease restaurant and retail properties. The company, a real estate investment trust (REIT), continues to expand its portfolio with this latest transaction.

feed.title: Republic Services, Inc. Sets Date for First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
feed.summary: Republic Services, Inc. (NYSE: RSG) has announced it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results after market close on Thursday, May 7, 2026. The company will also host an investor conference call at 5 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day. Details for accessing the live audio webcast, dial-in numbers, and replay information are provided for interested participants.

feed.title: A Chili's in Illinois sold for $2.3M with six years left on lease
feed.summary: Four Corners Property Trust (FCPT) has acquired a Chili's property in Illinois for $2.3 million. The property operates under a triple net lease with approximately six years remaining and was purchased at a 6.8% cap rate. FCPT is a real estate investment trust focused on ownership and acquisition of net-leased restaurant and retail properties.

feed.title: Clean Virginia report claims Dominion Energy bills are rising faster than inflation as customers struggle
feed.summary: A new report by Clean Virginia alleges that Dominion Energy bills are increasing at a rate faster than inflation, attributing this to an outdated regulatory framework, reliance on fossil fuels, tariffs, reduced federal tax credits, and the growth of data centers. Dominion Energy disputes these claims, stating their residential rates have remained below the national average and increased less than inflation, while emphasizing their investments in reliability and clean energy. One customer, a single mother, highlights her struggle with rising winter bills, which have increased by about $50 per month compared to previous years.

feed.title: Energy Transfer (NYSE:ET) Stock Price Down 1.5% - Time to Sell?
feed.summary: Shares of Energy Transfer (NYSE:ET) fell 1.5% to $19.02, despite maintaining positions above both its 50-day and 200-day moving averages. Analysts hold a "Moderate Buy" consensus with an average price target of $21.60, and several firms have recently increased their price targets. The company reported a Q4 EPS miss but revenue beat expectations, and while it raised its quarterly dividend to $0.335 for a 7.0% yield, concerns about the sustainability of the payout ratio persist.

feed.title: Bridgewater Bancshares (BWB) director granted 1,146 Common Stock shares
feed.summary: Bridgewater Bancshares Inc. director David J. Volk received a grant of 1,146 shares of Common Stock as compensation, increasing his direct holdings to 32,284 shares. This transaction, acquired at $0.00 per share, was a grant or award, not an open-market purchase, and also notes his indirect ownership of 298 shares through Volk Advisory Corp. The filing reflects an update to his ownership position without indicating a discretionary trade by the insider.

feed.title: Enterprise Products Partners (NYSE:EPD) Shares Down 3.2% - Time to Sell?
feed.summary: Enterprise Products Partners (NYSE:EPD) shares fell 3.2% to $37.83 on Tuesday with significantly increased trading volume. Despite analyst upgrades and a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target of $37.73, the stock experienced selling pressure. The company recently increased its quarterly dividend to $0.55 (5.8% yield) and reported strong earnings, with insider confidence signaled by CEO share purchases.

feed.title: TRNO PE Ratio & Valuation, Is TRNO Overvalued
feed.summary: This article analyzes the valuation of Terreno Realty Corp (TRNO), concluding that it is currently in the "Fair zone." Its forward PE ratio of 36.87 is considered fair compared to its five-year average of 46.14, with a fair price estimated between $60.05 and $88.52 using a relative valuation method. The analysis also compares TRNO's P/B ratio, FCF yield, and P/S ratio against historical averages and competitor benchmarks, noting its P/S ratio is above the industry average but justified by strong revenue growth.

feed.title: Skillz (NYSE: SKLZ) grows 2025 revenue to $104.5M but posts $70.4M loss
feed.summary: Skillz Inc. reported its financial results for Q4 and full-year 2025, with revenue growing to $104.5 million but incurring a net loss of $70.4 million. Despite the loss, the company saw a 16% year-over-year improvement in Adjusted EBITDA and positive Adjusted EBITDA from its RZR ad-tech segment. Skillz ended the year with $194.5 million in cash and cash equivalents, aiming for sustained profitability and optimized capital structure.

feed.title: 20/20 Biolabs 10-K: Revenues $2.05M, Net Loss $(3.74)M
feed.summary: 20/20 Biolabs reported fiscal-year revenue of $2.045 million, a 16.7% increase, driven by higher OneTest and CLIAx sales and a shift to a premium test mix. The company recorded a net loss of $(3.739) million, an improvement of 32.7% versus the prior year, with gross profit increasing to $0.605 million. Operational developments include the launch of OneTest for Longevity and expansion into multi-cancer screenings for veterans.

feed.title: C3.ai (AI) director’s tax-driven sale and matched buy, $3,509 remitted
feed.summary: C3.ai, Inc. director Jim H. Snabe conducted offsetting trades of Class A Common Stock on March 27, selling 10,000 shares at $8.08 and buying 10,000 shares at $7.73. The sale was necessitated by "exit tax" obligations related to his emigration from Denmark, and he remitted $3,509 in short-swing profits to the company. Following these transactions, Snabe directly holds 385,000 shares and indirectly holds 28,000 shares through BJHS Invest ApS.

It provides current stock price information, indicating no analyst ratings or forecasts for ENFR to rise. The content includes placeholders for growth, profitability, and efficiency data, suggesting that detailed analysis for ENFR is currently unavailable.

feed.title: 7,139 Core Molding (CMT) COO shares withheld to cover tax bill
feed.summary: Core Molding Technologies' Chief Operating Officer, Eric Palomaki, had 7,139 shares withheld to cover tax obligations on vesting restricted stock on March 27, 2026. These transactions, valued between $18.77 and $20.02 per share, were routine tax withholdings and not open-market sales. After these dispositions, Palomaki directly holds 161,760 shares of CMT common stock.

feed.title: BioLife Solutions (BLFS) executive sells 2,577 shares under 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Karen A. Foster, Chief Quality and Operations at BioLife Solutions (BLFS), sold 2,577 shares of common stock at a weighted average price of $19.17 per share. This transaction was conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1(c) trading plan adopted in December 2025. Following the sale, Foster directly holds 108,758 shares of BioLife Solutions common stock.

feed.summary: This article provides an analysis of GraniteShares Bloomberg Commodity Broad Strategy No K-1 ETF (COMB) for 2026, though it largely indicates a current lack of detailed data. It shows the current stock price and highlights that Wall Street analysts forecast no change in COMB's price and have 0 Buy, Hold, or Sell ratings. The article primarily serves as a placeholder for future financial and analytical data.

feed.title: [ARS] COLUMBIA BANKING SYSTEM, INC. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article announces an ARS SEC filing by Columbia Banking System, Inc. (COLB), filed on March 31, 2026. The filing is assessed with low impact and neutral sentiment, and is available as a PDF document. The article also provides recent news and other SEC filings for COLB, along with key stock data.

feed.title: Dyne Therapeutics Announces Participation at 2026 Academy
feed.summary: Dyne Therapeutics will present three posters at the AMCP 2026 Annual Conference, focusing on Duchenne muscular dystrophy (DMD) and myotonic dystrophy type 1 (DM1). The company aims to prepare for potential US launches of its neuromuscular medicines in 2027 and 2028 by engaging with payers to highlight the benefits of its investigational therapeutics. This participation helps contextualize clinical trial results for managed care experts and ensures access decisions reflect patient needs.

feed.title: Coca-Cola Consolidated ordered to pay injured worker reassigned to lower-paying role
feed.summary: A Tennessee workers' compensation court has ordered Coca-Cola Consolidated to pay an injured 30-year employee nearly $20,000 after he was reassigned to lower-paying roles upon returning to work. The ruling emphasizes the financial risks employers face when return-to-work placements do not properly reinstate an injured worker to an equivalent position. The court's decision hinged on the employee's 30 years of tenure, finding it reasonable for him to accept the lower-paying role rather than abandoning accumulated benefits.

feed.title: ProFrac (ACDC) CCO reports share disposals tied to vesting awards
feed.summary: Matthew A. Greenwood, Chief Commercial Officer of ProFrac Holding Corp. (ACDC), reported several dispositions of Class A common stock on March 27, 2026. These transactions, which included returning shares to the issuer for vested performance-based and restricted stock awards and disposing of shares to cover withholding taxes, resulted in Greenwood directly holding 134,350 shares of ProFrac Class A common stock after these awards. The disposals were mostly settled in cash at $6.63 per share.

feed.title: Revenue per share of ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. – SWB:2AR
feed.summary: This article focuses on the revenue per share for ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. (SWB:2AR) on the Stuttgart Stock Exchange. It presents financial data provided by ICE Data Services and FactSet, highlighting that the market is currently closed with no trades. The content primarily lists various financial tools and community features offered by TradingView alongside disclaimers regarding data sources.

feed.title: VIAV Should I Buy
feed.summary: An analysis of Viavi Solutions Inc (VIAV) suggests that it is not a compelling buy opportunity for beginner, long-term investors at this time. While analysts are overwhelmingly positive and have raised price targets citing growth in data centers and aerospace & defense, recent financial performance shows a significant drop in net income and EPS. Technical indicators are mixed, and a pre-market price drop indicates short-term bearish sentiment, leading to a "Hold" recommendation.

feed.summary: This article analyzes the valuation of Shattuck Labs Inc (STTK) based on various financial metrics. It indicates that STTK is currently in the "Fair zone" when compared to its five-year average forward PS ratio, noting a fair price range between NaN and NaN. The analysis also highlights STTK's Price-to-Book (P/B) ratio and Forward Free Cash Flow (FCF) yield, comparing them to historical averages and industry benchmarks.

feed.title: UMC PE Ratio & Valuation, Is UMC Overvalued
feed.summary: United Microelectronics Corp (UMC) is currently considered undervalued, with a forward PE ratio of 10.10 compared to its five-year average of 11.38. Its fair price is estimated to be between $12.18 and $15.78, making the current price of $8.98 undervalued by 26.27%. However, some metrics like its P/S ratio suggest a premium above the industry average, which may be unsustainable despite robust revenue growth.

feed.title: AKR PE Ratio & Valuation, Is AKR Overvalued
feed.summary: Acadia Realty Trust (AKR) is currently deemed overvalued, with its forward PS ratio of 8.03 significantly higher than its five-year average. The fair price is estimated to be between $11.14 and $16.44, making the current price of $18.89 about 14.93% overvalued. The company's P/S ratio also exceeds the industry average, which, combined with its revenue growth, suggests this premium may be unsustainable.

feed.title: Real Estate: Sector Outperformed in Q1, Though Performance Still Lags Broader Market Over Last 12 Months
feed.summary: The real estate sector outperformed the broader market in Q1 2026, driven by falling interest rates, despite lagging over the past 12 months. Morningstar's coverage of the sector currently trades at a 12% discount to fair value, with many REITs rated 4 or 5 stars. Kilroy Realty, Invitation Homes, and Healthpeak Properties are highlighted as top picks due to their strong fundamentals and undervaluation.

feed.title: O’Reilly Auto Schedules First Quarter 2026 Results Release
feed.summary: O’Reilly Automotive, Inc. (ORLY) is scheduled to release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on April 29, 2026, after market close, with a conference call for investors and analysts set for April 30, 2026. A recent analyst rating on ORLY stock is a Buy with a $109.00 price target, while TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, rates ORLY as Neutral, citing strong operating profitability and positive cash generation balanced by significant balance-sheet leverage and rich valuation.

feed.title: Will Rockwell Automation's (ROK) ROKStudios Autonomy Push Reframe Its AI Disruption Narrative?
feed.summary: Rockwell Automation's new ROKStudios video series highlights its focus on autonomous industrial operations, cyber resilience, and AI-enabled workflows, aiming to align its brand with customers' modernization challenges. This initiative comes amidst Jefferies' concerns about AI disruption potentially capping Rockwell's valuation despite its software moat. The article explores how this push for autonomy could either reinforce confidence in Rockwell's market positioning or raise questions about potential pricing power compression from new AI tools.

feed.title: Roper Technologies Secures New Five-Year $3.5 Billion Credit Facility
feed.summary: Roper Technologies has secured a new five-year $3.5 billion unsecured revolving credit facility, replacing its previous 2022 facility of the same size. This new agreement enhances liquidity, offers flexible terms, and strengthens the company's access to banking services for future growth investments. Despite a current analyst Sell rating, TipRanks' AI Analyst "Spark" gives ROP an Outperform score, citing strong financial quality and a solid 2026 outlook.

feed.title: Roper Technologies enters new five-year unsecured credit facility on March 30, 2026 - SEC filing
feed.summary: Roper Technologies has secured a new five-year unsecured credit facility, as detailed in an SEC filing. This financial move was finalized on March 30, 2026. The article also provides recent analyst adjustments to Roper Technologies' price targets and outlines the company's business segments.

feed.title: Walmart opening first-ever store in this city in April. See location.
feed.summary: Walmart is set to open its first store in Celina, Texas, on April 29, expanding its footprint in the Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex. This new opening follows Walmart's strong performance in 2025, with increased comparable store sales and net sales growth for Walmart International. The company continues to invest in its physical stores and omnichannel capabilities, while also leveraging AI, like its Sparky shopping assistant, to enhance customer experience and drive sales.

feed.title: Peter C. Farrell (RMD) sells 6,000 shares via Rule 144 notices (NYSE: RMD)
feed.summary: Peter C. Farrell has filed a Rule 144 notice, disclosing the sale of 6,000 shares of ResMed Inc. (RMD) common stock through three separate transactions of 2,000 shares each on January 7, 2026, February 4, 2026, and March 4, 2026. The filing also indicates option-derived share entries from November 2014 and November 2015. This Form 144 report details routine procedural sales of restricted securities.

feed.title: AT&T (T) Stock: Scotiabank Raises Price Target to $31.50 | T Sto
feed.summary: Scotiabank has maintained its "Sector Perform" rating for AT&T (T) and raised its price target from $31.00 to $31.50, indicating a 1.61% increase. This adjustment follows a series of varying analyst expectations for AT&T, which is the third-largest US wireless carrier, with its wireless business contributing almost 70% of its revenue. Wall Street analysts currently project an average target price of $29.93 for AT&T, suggesting an upside of 5.73% from the current price, while GuruFocus estimates a GF Value of $22.20, indicating a potential downside of 21.58%.

feed.title: Freeport-McMoRan (NYSE: FCX) director takes 350-share equity grant in lieu of cash
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan director John Joseph Stephens received 350 shares of common stock as an equity grant, valued at $58.78 per share, in place of a portion of his annual cash retainer fee. Following this transaction, he directly holds 68,377 shares and indirectly holds 45,000 shares through a limited partnership, with an additional 17,900 restricted stock units. This Form 4 filing details the compensation-related grant, clarifying his updated beneficial ownership in FCX.

feed.title: Hugh Grant of Freeport-McMoRan (NYSE: FCX) takes 574 shares as retainer
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan (NYSE: FCX) director Hugh Grant received 574 shares of common stock on April 1, 2026, as part of his annual retainer fee election to take stock instead of cash. Following this grant, he beneficially owns 46,514 shares, including 17,900 Restricted Stock Units, highlighting a compensation-related equity grant rather than a market transaction. This transaction was reported in a Form 4 SEC filing, detailing the non-derivative securities acquired by Grant.

feed.title: Roper Technologies Enters New Five-Year Unsecured Credit Facility On March 30, 2026 - SEC Filing
feed.summary: Roper Technologies has entered into a new five-year unsecured credit facility on March 30, 2026. This information was disclosed in an SEC filing, as reported by Refinitiv.

feed.title: Public Storage Operating Company files for offering of $500 million 5.000% senior notes due 2035
feed.summary: Public Storage Operating Company has filed for an offering of $500 million 5.000% senior notes due in 2035. This financial move indicates the company's efforts to raise capital through debt financing. The article notes this announcement was made on April 1, 2026.

feed.title: CSX grant helps Lowcountry Food Bank buy produce from veteran farmers
feed.summary: The Lowcountry Food Bank received a grant from CSX Transportation to purchase produce from local veteran farmers. This initiative aims to support veteran farmers and address food insecurity, particularly among veterans, by distributing fresh produce. The program aligns with the food bank's "Growing Food Locally" initiative, which partners with small, historically underserved farms to provide nutritious food and economic opportunities.

feed.title: Chipotle to Join Downtown Bellevue's The Eight Office Tower
feed.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill will open a new location in downtown Bellevue's The Eight office tower, expanding its presence in the area. The new 1,900 square-foot restaurant is expected to open in late 2026 and will be joined by Sabine Café and Bar in the building's retail pavilion. The Eight is a 25-story office building with 80% of its office space currently leased, including a large portion by The Pokémon Company International.

feed.title: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. Urges Driven Brands Holdings Inc. Investors With Substantial Losses to Contact the Firm Before May 8th
feed.summary: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. has filed a class action lawsuit against Driven Brands Holdings Inc. on behalf of investors who purchased shares between May 9, 2023, and February 24, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Driven Brands made material errors in its financial statements, leading to restatements and a significant drop in stock price. Investors have until May 8, 2026, to apply to be appointed as lead plaintiff.
